title: LushGlow
description: This resourcepack makes leaves more lush and ores glow in darkness.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/t8IPU5XnfeQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- This Resourcepack requires Fabric API and Continuity.

- The Resourcepack enhances the user's experience in Minecraft so that the ores will be visible in caves and night time, and notice that ore block is different than deepslate ore.

- The grass blocks are also better, it makes trees and forests look more lush and alive which will give the user a better experience (It mildly affects fps)

- The pictures were taken using shaders which are not included in the resourcepack.

- Reminder! New ore design is LushGlow3.0 and old ore design is LushGlow2.0.

###  - The video include the Newest update of LushGlow5.0.
